'''zhathama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyebald|pyebald]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyebald|pyebald]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhathama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæthæmæth|zhæthæmæth]] || [[word:zhæthæmæj|zhæthæmæj]] || [[word:zhæthæmæsh|zhæthæmæsh]] || [[word:zhæthæmæ|zhæthæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhathathamath|zhathathamath]] || [[word:zhathathamaj|zhathathamaj]] || [[word:zhathathamash|zhathathamash]] || [[word:zhathathama|zhathathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhathamath|zhathamath]] || [[word:zhathamaj|zhathamaj]] || [[word:zhathamash|zhathamash]] || [[word:zhathama|zhathama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhathafmath|zhathafmath]] || [[word:zhathafmaj|zhathafmaj]] || [[word:zhathafmash|zhathafmash]] || [[word:zhathafmaf|zhathafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhathamatha|zhathamatha]] || [[word:zhathamaja|zhathamaja]] || [[word:zhathamasha|zhathamasha]] || [[word:zhathamaka|zhathamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhathamath|zhathamath]] || [[word:zhathamaj|zhathamaj]] || [[word:zhathamash|zhathamash]] || [[word:zhathama|zhathama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhathamathal|zhathamathal]] || [[word:zhathamajal|zhathamajal]] || [[word:zhathamashal|zhathamashal]] || [[word:zhathamakal|zhathamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhathamathatha|zhathamathatha]] || [[word:zhathamajaja|zhathamajaja]] || [[word:zhathamashasha|zhathamashasha]] || [[word:zhathamaka|zhathamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhathamathan|zhathamathan]] || [[word:zhathamajan|zhathamajan]] || [[word:zhathamashan|zhathamashan]] || [[word:zhathamakan|zhathamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhathamathaoro|zhathamathaoro]] || [[word:zhathamajaoro|zhathamajaoro]] || [[word:zhathamashaoro|zhathamashaoro]] || [[word:zhathamakaoro|zhathamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
